sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁחר

Transliteration: shâchar

Phonetic: shaw-khar'

BDB Definition:

  1. to seek, seek early or earnestly, look early or diligently for
    1. (Qal) to look for diligently, seek
    2. (Piel) to seek, seek early

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 2369

Part(s) of speech: Verb
